title: Dalek's And Cybermen
description: Explore the depths of the Doctor Who universe.
body:
# What is the Daleks And Cybermen mod? The Daleks And Cybermen mod brings the world of Doctor Who to Minecraft. You can explore different planets and the vastness of space. You can witness the past and present of the planets you step on and fight many enemies from Daleks to the Slitheen Family. ![bar](https://i.imgur.com/TRxXpSK.png) ## FEATURES

INCLUDED MOBS

DALEKS
  1. Time War Dalek
  2. Time War Emperors Guard Dalek
  3. Special Weapons Dalek
  4. Exxilon Dalek
  5. Invasion Dalek
  6. Mastermind Dalek
  7. Invasion Pilot Dalek
  8. Invasion Supreme Dalek
  9. Bombarder Dalek
  10. Imperial Dalek
  11. Movie Dalek Red
  12. Movie Dalek Blue
  13. Movie Dalek Black
  14. Chase Dalek
  15. Dead Planet Dalek
  16. Renegade Dalek
CYBERMEN
  1. CYBERMAN
  2. CYBER-VILLAGER
OTHER CREATURES
  1. Slitheen
  2. Are You My Mummy Villager
  3. Space Villager
  4. Thal
  5. Thal Scientist
  6. Thal Guard
  7. Living Armour Stand
  8. Remote Control Spiders
  9. Kaleds
  10. Empty Dalek Shell
  11. Davros Chair
BOSSES
  1. Davros
  2. The Dalek Emperor

 

DIMENSIONS
  1. Gallifrey
  2. Skaro
  3. Moon
  4. Space

 

TIME ZONES
  1. Pre-100-year war Skaro
  2. After the 100-year war Skaro
